ogTitle: Condamine Farms vs Condon: Climate Safety

heading: Condamine Farms vs Condon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Condamine Farms, Queensland and Condon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Condon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Condamine Farms (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Condamine Farms or Condon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Condamine Farms has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Condon scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Condamine Farms scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Condon scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Condamine Farms or Condon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Condon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
